sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal mapper used to load DIT input samples into bit-reversed memory order.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 cosine and sine values.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point radix-2 complex butterfly with FFT and IFFT twiddle sign support.
sub_modules.fft16_output_scale: Combinational output normalization block that passes FFT results unchanged and divides IFFT results by 16.
